debug_info.goal:
α : Type u_1

idx1 idx2 : ℕ
hidx1 : idx1 < l1.length
hidx2 : idx2 < l2.length
heq : l1[idx1] = l2[idx2]
hperm : l1.Perm l2
⊢ (l1.eraseIdx idx1).Perm (l2.eraseIdx idx2)

failed_attempts:
rw [← List.Perm.eq_of_sublist_of_length_eq (sublist_eraseIdx _ _) (sublist_eraseIdx _ _)]
  · apply hperm.erase
    simp [heq]
  · simp [List.length_eraseIdx, hidx1, hidx2]

rw [← List.Perm.eq_of_sublist_of_length_eq]
  · apply List.sublist_of_Perm_erase
    · exact hperm
    · exact heq
  · simp [List.length_eraseIdx, hidx1, hidx2]

  · apply List.sublist_of_perm_erase
    · exact hperm
    · exact heq
  · simp [List.length_eraseIdx, hidx1, hidx2]
rw [← List.Perm.erase_eq hperm heq]

rw [← List.Perm.eq_of_sublist_of_length_eq, List.sublist_eraseIdx_of_perm hperm heq,
    List.length_eraseIdx, List.length_eraseIdx]
  <;> simp [hidx1, hidx2]

rw [← List.Perm.eq_of_perm_heq hperm heq]

rw [← List.Perm.eq_of_perm_get? hperm ⟨idx1, hidx1⟩ ⟨idx2, hidx2⟩ heq]

rw [← List.Perm.eq_of_mem_iff hperm]
  intro x
  simp only [List.mem_eraseIdx, heq, exists_prop, and_imp]
